storyHook: 开机设铃声，拍照发图，查信息
storyBlurb: 手机电量告急，甲一边充电一边忙着拍照发图，终于充好电收好手机。
storyScript:
【开场·拿出手机】晚上八点，甲电量只剩百分之二十，赶紧找充电线，插上才安心。

【进行·拍照发信】甲把今天拍的照片发给朋友乙，一起决定明天的拍照计划，顺手换了铃声。

【收束·充电收好】电量涨到三十，甲挂断通话，把充电线绕好留着过夜充电。

narrative.when: 晚上八点，手机电量只剩百分之二十
narrative.who: 甲（手机主人）· 乙（朋友，视频里聊天）
narrative.how: 一边充电一边操作手机
narrative.method: 拍照发给朋友、查看消息、设置铃声、充好电收好
narrative.event: 甲想把今天拍的照片发给朋友，又怕手机没电关机

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My phone is almost dead. Twenty parts in a hundred.
turns.zh: 我手机快没电了，只剩百分之二十。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Already? You only charged it this morning.
turns.zh: 已经没了？你早上才充过的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. The old ones go fast.
turns.zh: 我知道，旧手机掉电快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Find your wire before it dies.
turns.zh: 赶紧找充电线，别让它关机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am looking. It is always somewhere behind the seat.
turns.zh: 找呢，总是在沙发后面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did you check under the side thing?
turns.zh: 有没有看沙发侧面？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Found it. Behind the soft part, as always.
turns.zh: 找到了，在靠垫后面，一贯如此。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Some things never change.
turns.zh: 有些事永远不会变。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The charging sign is on. Good.
turns.zh: 充电图标亮了，好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now we can talk. I was waiting for those pictures.
turns.zh: 现在我们可以聊了，我等你的照片等了好久。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, the pictures. Let me open the picture book.
turns.zh: 对，照片。让我打开相册。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How many did you take today?
turns.zh: 今天拍了几张？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A lot. Mostly the evening sky and a small cat.
turns.zh: 很多，大部分是傍晚的天空和一只小猫。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A cat? Where?
turns.zh: 猫？在哪？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: On the road near the restaurant. It was sitting on a box.
turns.zh: 在餐馆旁边的路上，它坐在一个箱子上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Send me that one first.
turns.zh: 先发那张给我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sending now. It is a good one.
turns.zh: 发了，这张拍得不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh! It is so small and round.
turns.zh: 哇！它好小好圆。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It came right up to me. No fear at all.
turns.zh: 它径直走过来，一点都不怕人。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Can I use this as my screen picture?
turns.zh: 我可以用这个当我的屏幕壁纸吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Of course. Now the sky picture.
turns.zh: 当然可以，现在发天空那张。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, the color. What time was this?
turns.zh: 哇，这颜色！这是几点拍的？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just before the light went. About six.
turns.zh: 太阳刚下去的时候，大概六点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You caught it at the right moment.
turns.zh: 你抓到了最好的那一刻。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I almost missed it. I was in the restaurant and saw the color through the door.
turns.zh: 我差点错过了，在餐馆里透过门看到颜色，赶紧出来拍的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Worth going outside for.
turns.zh: 值得出去拍。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My food went cold.
turns.zh: 我的饭都冷了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A small price.
turns.zh: 小小的代价。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My phone is at fifteen now. Going down fast.
turns.zh: 手机到百分之十五了，掉得很快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it plugged in?
turns.zh: 充电线插了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but the wire is short and I have to sit by the wall.
turns.zh: 插了，但线太短，我只能坐在墙边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You need a longer wire.
turns.zh: 你需要一根长一点的线。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep saying that.
turns.zh: 我一直这么说。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Say it to the shop.
turns.zh: 去店里说。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha. True. Now, I want to change my bell sound.
turns.zh: 哈，说得对。好了，我想换铃声。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The one you have now is very loud.
turns.zh: 你现在这个铃声太响了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. It goes off and everyone looks at me.
turns.zh: 我知道，响起来所有人都看我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open the settings. Go to sound.
turns.zh: 打开设置，找到声音。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am in sound now. There are so many to pick from.
turns.zh: 我进声音设置了，有好多可以选。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Try the short light ones. Not the long deep ones.
turns.zh: 试试短促轻快的，别选那种长低音的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one sounds like morning birds.
turns.zh: 这个听起来像早晨的鸟叫声。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not bad. Try the next.
turns.zh: 不错，再试试下一个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, that one is too happy. Like a game.
turns.zh: 哦，那个太欢快了，像游戏声音。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The bird one was better.
turns.zh: 鸟叫那个更好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Agreed. I will go back to the bird one.
turns.zh: 同意，我换回鸟叫那个。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now I can call you and not feel bad for the room.
turns.zh: 好，这样我打电话给你，不会让全屋的人都知道了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha. It is set. Done.
turns.zh: 哈，设好了，搞定。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is your phone up to now?
turns.zh: 你手机电量到多少了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Twenty-two. Going up slowly.
turns.zh: 百分之二十二，慢慢在涨。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Slow charger.
turns.zh: 充电器充得慢啊。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Old wire. I really do need a new one.
turns.zh: 线老了，我真的需要换一根新的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Get one tomorrow at the corner shop.
turns.zh: 明天去街角的店买一根。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are you going out tomorrow?
turns.zh: 你明天出门吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I thought we could meet at the open space near the trees.
turns.zh: 是的，我想我们可以在树边的空地碰面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The green place by the road?
turns.zh: 路边那块绿地？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That one. Bring your picture machine.
turns.zh: 对，带上你的相机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: For the cat?
turns.zh: 为了拍猫？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: For everything. I want to try that water glass trick you showed me.
turns.zh: 拍什么都行，我想试试你给我看的那个水杯技巧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The one where you put the glass in front of the sun?
turns.zh: 就是把水杯放在太阳前面那个？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I tried it alone and it looked wrong.
turns.zh: 对，我自己试过，拍出来不对。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have to hold the glass very still and get low.
turns.zh: 你要把杯子拿得很稳，还要蹲低一点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Get low?
turns.zh: 蹲低？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Get on one knee. The picture comes out much better.
turns.zh: 对，单腿跪下，拍出来好看很多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is going to look strange in public.
turns.zh: 在外面这么做会很奇怪吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: People who take pictures always look strange.
turns.zh: 拍照的人看起来都奇奇怪怪的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Fair point.
turns.zh: 说得也是。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will show you the right way tomorrow. It is easier in person.
turns.zh: 我明天当面教你，当面教容易多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. What time?
turns.zh: 好，几点？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Morning is best. Before the sun gets high.
turns.zh: 早上最好，在太阳变高之前。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Eight? Nine?
turns.zh: 八点？九点？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Nine is fine. I need time for food first.
turns.zh: 九点可以，我要先吃个东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nine at the green place. Done.
turns.zh: 九点在绿地，说定了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in my phone now so I do not forget.
turns.zh: 我现在就存进手机，免得忘了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. Your phone is at what now?
turns.zh: 好主意，你手机到多少了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Twenty-eight. Still going slow.
turns.zh: 二十八了，还是充得慢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You should sleep soon anyway.
turns.zh: 你也该睡了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. I just want to check my messages first.
turns.zh: 我知道，先看看消息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Anyone interesting?
turns.zh: 有什么有趣的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My sister sent a picture of her new place.
turns.zh: 我姐姐发来一张她新家的照片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Nice?
turns.zh: 好看吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Very. Big windows and a lot of light.
turns.zh: 很好看，大窗户，光线很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Where did she move to?
turns.zh: 她搬到哪里了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Near the station. The trip to work is much shorter now.
turns.zh: 在车站附近，她说上班路程短多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the best thing about a new place.
turns.zh: 这是搬新家最好的事情之一。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: She sounded happy in her message.
turns.zh: 她消息里听起来很开心。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Did you write back?
turns.zh: 你回了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not yet. I will do it now.
turns.zh: 还没，我现在回。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will wait.
turns.zh: 我等你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Told her the new place looks great.
turns.zh: 发完了，跟她说新家看起来很棒。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now put down the phone.
turns.zh: 好了，放下手机吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more thing.
turns.zh: 还有一件事。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There is always one more thing with you.
turns.zh: 你总是有一件事。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I need to set my morning sound.
turns.zh: 我要设置早上的闹钟声音。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What do you use now?
turns.zh: 你现在用的什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A very loud bell. It hits me like a wall.
turns.zh: 一个很响的铃声，像撞墙一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is why you are always in a bad way in the morning.
turns.zh: 难怪你早上总是状态不好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha. Maybe the bird sound for mornings too.
turns.zh: 哈，也许早上也换成鸟叫声。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Much better idea.
turns.zh: 这主意好多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Set. Now I can sleep.
turns.zh: 设好了，现在可以睡了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Phone at thirty now?
turns.zh: 手机现在到三十了吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thirty. Close enough for tonight.
turns.zh: 三十，今晚够了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Leave it on the wire. It will charge while you sleep.
turns.zh: 就挂在充电线上，睡觉的时候自己充。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I always forget to do that.
turns.zh: 好主意，我总忘了这么做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go. I will okay at nine tomorrow.
turns.zh: 去睡吧，明天九点见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Nine. And bring something warm to drink.
turns.zh: 九点，记得带杯热饮。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Goodnight.
turns.zh: 我带，晚安。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Goodnight. And thanks for waiting for the pictures.
turns.zh: 晚安，谢谢你等着看我的照片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The cat made it worth the wait.
turns.zh: 那只猫让等待变得值得了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought you would say that.
turns.zh: 我就知道你会这么说。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sleep well.
turns.zh: 好好睡。
